note: Portugal layers are OSM-derived proxies. permanent_care captures SAP/AP/atendimento complementar name patterns and should be reviewed against official SNS/ERS facility registers if a stable downloadable endpoint is identified.

official_source_notes.hospital_emergency_official: SNS Transparency Portal dataset caracterizacao-das-valencias-de-urgencia, facility-level coordinates.
official_source_notes.primary_care: Still OSM-derived. SNS Transparency Unidades Funcionais is aggregate by CSP area, not individual facility-level points.
official_source_notes.permanent_care: SAP/AP recognized as a relevant layer, but no stable official facility-level downloadable list was identified in this pass.
